# Flow: Receipt import

Scan hub → upload → review → success → pantry

## Diagram

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  Hub[/scan/kvitto]
  Parse[API receipt-parse]
  Review[ReceiptBulkAddFlow]
  Success[ReceiptImportSuccessMoment]
  Pantry[/inventory]
  Hub --> Parse
  Parse --> Review
  Review --> Success
  Review --> Pantry
```

## Steps

| # | Step | Route | Screenshot | Source |
|---|------|-------|------------|--------|
| 1 | Receipt upload | `/scan/kvitto` | [receipt-upload](../SCREENSHOTS/receipt-upload.png) | `src/routes/scan/kvitto/+page.server.ts` |
| 2 | Parse & review lines | `/scan/kvitto` | [receipt-review](../SCREENSHOTS/receipt-review.png) | `src/lib/components/organisms/ReceiptBulkAddFlow.svelte` |
| 3 | Import success moment | `/scan/kvitto` | [receipt-success](../SCREENSHOTS/receipt-success.png) | `src/lib/components/organisms/ReceiptImportSuccessMoment.svelte` |
| 4 | Pantry updated | `/inventory` | [pantry](../SCREENSHOTS/pantry.png) | `src/lib/components/organisms/PantryV2Page.svelte` |
